## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] If Zod schemas under `src/schemas/` changed: ran `pnpm run generate-schemas` and reviewed `schemas/*.schema.json` diffs

## Documentation

- [ ] **README.md** or **docs/** — I updated them for a **significant** change to suite YAML, CLI, adapters, assertions, or eval record contracts, **or** I did not need to (small fix / internal-only / no documented behavior change). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/alis-build/harness-eval-ts/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md).
